segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Sure, here it is. I think I'm in section 23, but I'm not totally sure where to go.

segments.speaker: Usher
segments.text: You're on the right level. Go left, then up the stairs.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great, thank you. This is my first baseball game in Boston.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah. I know the basic rules, but I'm still learning the flow.

segments.speaker: Fan
segments.text: You'll pick it up. Half the fun is just being here.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: The atmosphere is already worth it.

segments.speaker: Fan
segments.text: Wait until the crowd gets going.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Who should I keep an eye on today?

segments.speaker: Fan
segments.text: Watch the starting pitcher and the guy batting third.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. I appreciate the crash course.
